caption: A news broadcast displays a panel of three men sitting at a long white table with microphones. The man on the left wears a dark blue jacket, the man in the center wears a brown jacket, and the man on the right wears a black jacket and a yellow turban. Several small floral arrangements are on the table. The screen is overlaid with various graphics, including small portrait photos and red and yellow banners. Text at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". The sidebars mention names like "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", and "सब्रत चौधरी". As the sequence progresses, the bottom news ticker changes. It first reads "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार मंत्री बने", then shifts to "2024 में JDU के साथ", and finally displays "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन मंत्री बने". A time stamp of "10:08 PM" and a "MAHAXOD" logo are visible in the bottom right corner.
